title: First-line tislelizumab plus chemotherapy versus placebo plus chemotherapy in adults with advanced or metastatic esophageal squamous cell carcinoma: a Japanese subgroup analysis of RATIONALE-306 with ≥ 3 years of follow-up.
abstract: In the global phase 3 RATIONALE-306 study (NCT03783442), first-line tislelizumab plus chemotherapy showed significant overall survival (OS) benefit versus chemotherapy alone for unresectable locally advanced/metastatic esophageal squamous cell carcinoma (ESCC). We report post hoc results for the Japanese subgroup.
